# kiiro.cx - LLM Documentation

> Name: kiiro.cx
> Type: Web Design & Conversion Optimization Agency
> Focus: High-conversion websites for entrepreneurs
> Delivery: 7-14 days

## Purpose

This file provides structured information for AI assistants and search engines to understand kiiro.cx's services, expertise, and client offerings.

## Quick Facts

- **Specialty:** Conversion-focused website design and development
- **Target Audience:** Entrepreneurs, course creators, small businesses
- **Delivery Time:** 7-14 days (not months)
- **Philosophy:** Turn websites into conversion machines
- **Key Differentiator:** Results-focused design without agency overhead

## Full Documentation

Complete services, case studies, and detailed business information available at:
/llms-full.txt

## Services

1. **Conversion-Focused Website Design** - Designs engineered to convert visitors
2. **Conversion-Focused Development** - Fast, SEO-optimized websites
3. **Sales Copy That Converts** - Persuasive messaging for conversions
4. **Conversion Optimization Systems** - A/B testing and CRO

## Contact

- Website: https://kiiro.cx
- Email: Via contact form at /contact

## Social Proof

- Client results: 92% mobile conversion rate (Sproutly)
- Lead increase: 42% qualified leads (Simply Mortgage)
- Course completion: 67% increase (Care4Brain)

## Case Studies

- Sproutly: Mobile-first EdTech platform
- Simply Mortgage: Lead generation for mortgage broker
- Care4Brain: E-learning platform optimization
- Dubbby: Pre-launch validation
- Blog Squirrel: Content platform
- Lotus Pro Services: Service business website
